# Vaibrant

> Vaibrant is an AI services agency that designs, builds, and deploys production-grade autonomous AI systems, workflow automations, and data intelligence platforms for businesses seeking measurable operational leverage.

Website: https://vaibrant.agency
Contact: Free strategy call via Calendly (link on site)
Status: Active — 13 systems deployed in production

---

## About

Vaibrant is a 4-person founding team of AI engineers and strategists. The agency operates at the intersection of large language model engineering, no-code/low-code automation, and data analytics. All engagements are outcomes-focused: systems are scoped, built, and handed over with documented infrastructure.

Core differentiators:
- LLM-powered agents with 40+ integrated tools per deployment
- Production-grade automation using Make.com, n8n, and proprietary OpenClaw framework
- Full-stack AI systems from data ingestion to decision layer
- 13 deployed production systems across advertising, sales, support, and analytics

---

## Services

### 1. Autonomous AI Agents
LLM-powered agents capable of executing multi-step tasks across integrated platforms. Built with tool-use architectures supporting 40+ connectors per agent.

Capabilities:
- Paid advertising management (Meta, Google) with autonomous bid/budget adjustments
- Customer support triage with intent classification and escalation routing
- Lead scoring pipelines with enrichment, qualification, and CRM handoff
- Churn detection with behavioral signal monitoring and retention action triggers
- Cold outreach personalization and sequencing at scale

### 2. Workflow & Platform Automation
End-to-end process automation using industry-standard and proprietary tools.

Platforms supported:
- Make.com (Integromat) — multi-step scenario design and deployment
- n8n — self-hosted workflow automation with custom node development
- OpenClaw — Vaibrant's proprietary enterprise integration framework
- Google Workspace — Docs, Sheets, Gmail, Calendar, Drive automation

Use cases: inter-system data synchronization, document generation, approval flows, reporting pipelines, CRM/ERP integration.

### 3. Data Intelligence & Growth
Real-time analytics infrastructure and predictive modeling for growth and retention.

Capabilities:
- Real-time analytics dashboards with custom KPI tracking
- Content trend detection for social and SEO opportunity identification
- Predictive churn scoring using historical behavioral and transactional data
- Funnel analysis and conversion optimization instrumentation
- Automated reporting with anomaly alerting

---

## Projects

13 production systems deployed. Key projects:

**Meta Ads Manager Agent**
Autonomous agent managing Meta (Facebook/Instagram) advertising campaigns. Handles budget reallocation, audience adjustments, creative rotation, and performance reporting without manual intervention.

**OpenClaw Enterprise Integration**
Vaibrant's proprietary integration framework for connecting enterprise systems. Enables bidirectional data sync across ERP, CRM, marketing, and support platforms with custom transformation logic.

**AI Social Media Engine**
Automated content creation, scheduling, and performance analysis system. Detects trending topics, generates platform-optimized content, and adjusts posting cadence based on engagement signals.

**Cold Email Engine**
AI-powered outbound prospecting system. Handles lead sourcing, enrichment, personalization using LLM copywriting, multi-step sequence management, and reply classification.

**CAIO Intelligence Platform**
Chief AI Officer intelligence layer — a strategic dashboard aggregating signals across business units to surface prioritized decisions and opportunities for leadership.

**Predictive Churn Monitor**
Real-time churn risk scoring system. Monitors behavioral signals (login frequency, feature usage, support tickets, billing events) and triggers retention workflows when thresholds are crossed.

Additional deployed systems include support triage agents, lead qualification pipelines, analytics automation, and platform integrations across SaaS and e-commerce verticals.

---

## Team

**Muhammad Rayyan Mohsin — Lead AI Engineer**
Responsible for LLM agent architecture, tool-use system design, and technical delivery. Portfolio: https://rayyanmohsin.com

Responsible for infrastructure design, integration architecture, and platform engineering.

**Abdullah Nadeem — AI Strategist**
Responsible for client engagement, solution scoping, and AI adoption strategy.

**Haider Farooq — Operations Lead**
Responsible for project delivery, process design, and operational systems.
